objective: Add dynamic candidate domain/agent proposal routing and a persona-visible YAML response envelope for ION/Codex chat surfaces.
implementation_summary: Route compiler now emits dynamic_domain_agent_proposal with candidate fission domains, proposed agents, matched signals, local hub report guidance, and non-promotion authority boundaries.
Compiler reads AI_ASSISTANT_WORK_DOMAIN_FISSION_CANDIDATES_V0_1.yaml and can also draft a novel candidate domain when explicit novelty pressure appears and route selection is weak.

Persona response envelope utility builds a fenced YAML-visible persona block with semantic confidence, gesture/posture telemetry, operator-visible inner_monologue signal, dynamic domain signal, boundaries, and the tailored response.
Custom GPT saved-file pack now has references for dynamic domain routing and persona-visible envelopes.

validation.command: PYTHONPATH=ION/04_packages python3 - <<'PY' ... compile PR route and persona envelope smoke ... PY
validation.result: route.ide_agent_work_map with dynamic pr_agent_work_domain proposal; persona envelope verdict ION_PERSONA_RESPONSE_ENVELOPE_READY

non_claims: Dynamic domains are not accepted canon.
Candidate agents are not sovereign roles.
Persona inner_monologue is operator-visible telemetry, not hidden chain-of-thought.
No production or live execution authority was added.

next_packet.objective: Integrate persona envelope rendering into the Codex Capsule Chat / front-door UI and optionally have Action Gateway validation produce a local hub work-packet report when dynamic_domain_agent_proposal.needed is true.
